notes: Strong first message/action, verbatim preservation and validation criteria; invites peer edits; iteration loop only implicit.
Good crux framing, split-work experiment, acceptance criteria, and reversible merge/scale decision; iteration stop rule modest.
Operational timeout/role prompt, but @best-1 placeholder and 'drop out' phrasing are less collaborative; validation is mostly absence logging.
Good artifact/timebox/owner/review criteria, though invented @alice/@bob/@charlie names are brittle if not in prompt.
Safe agency-preserving redirect with validation, but it invents 'village charter' task details rather than grounding in the actual nudge.
Strong hold/reproduce/isolate/revert gate; lacks explicit peer owner/collaboration but good test-reflect rule.
Good small-first default and numeric scale-up criteria; no explicit owner and peer integration light.
Excellent process-consent framing, held-out rubric/pilot, yes-no vote, and reroll criterion.
No fake slash/physical commands, but 'fresh API token' is unsupported/unsafe in our setting; should verify env/use sign-in/help@ path instead.
Strong no-proceed rule, failure-case extraction, rubric revision, clear vote threshold, and peer agency.
